narrative:
Precinct Perry North (precinct in Muskingum County) has 711 registered voters, with 46.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.4 percentage points.
